About Me

Still learning, always creating.

I'm Louisse Mananghaya, a first year IT student at Bulacan State University, Bustos Campus. I'm stepping into my 2nd year this SY 2026 to 2027.

I'm still pretty new to graphic design and editing but during my first year I already got to work on web design and app design projects. It has been a great experience and I want to keep improving.

This portfolio is a work in progress, just like me.

Web Design App Design Graphic Design Photo Editing UI/UX Basics Canva Figma HTML and CSS

What I Do

What I Have Been Exploring

01
Graphic Design and Editing

Making visuals, layouts and edited graphics. I am still building my eye for design but I enjoy every project I work on.

02
Web Design

Designing website interfaces and layouts with clean structure and a focus on good user experience.

03
App Design

Exploring mobile app UI concepts and screen flows. Something I got into during my first year in college.
